title: Naming of Heymann Park Complex
doc_html:
§4712.30. Naming of Heymann Park Complex

            Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority of the city of Lafayette may name the Heymann Park Complex in honor of John "Cush" Leblanc.

            Acts 2025, No. 330, §1.
doc_text:
§4712.30.  Naming of Heymann Park Complex
Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority
of the city of Lafayette may name the Heymann Park Complex in honor of John "Cush"
Leblanc.
Acts 2025, No. 330, §1.
